grand_findings.title: SEVERITY GRADIENT
grand_findings.finding: Mild 46.7%F → Fatal 74.5%F (ρ=0.96) — Most severe AEs show strongest female bias

grand_findings.title: GLP-1 MALE PARADOX
grand_findings.finding: GLP-1 RAs 24.6%F, tirzepatide 8.4%F — Revolutionary drugs show reversed sex pattern

grand_findings.title: DISEASE PREVALENCE PARADOX
grand_findings.finding: Female-prevalent diseases → male-biased drug signals (ρ=-0.650, p=0.009)

grand_findings.title: CONFIDENCE GRADIENT
grand_findings.finding: Low confidence 51.4%F → High confidence 62.2%F — Robust signals MORE female

grand_findings.title: HAEMATOLOGICAL DOMINANCE
grand_findings.finding: 71.5%F — Blood-related AEs most consistently female-biased organ system

grand_findings.title: ROUTE OF ADMINISTRATION
grand_findings.finding: Hospital IV 65.1%F vs oral 50.9%F vs SC 38.2%F vs inhaled 37.8%F

grand_findings.title: BLEEDING UNIVERSALITY
grand_findings.finding: 89.9%F across ALL anticoagulant classes — prasugrel 96.0%F

grand_findings.title: ACE INHIBITOR BIAS
grand_findings.finding: 72.4%F — lisinopril 84.5%F. ACE inhibitors consistently female-biased

grand_findings.title: ZOLPIDEM VALIDATION
grand_findings.finding: 60.3%F validates FDA 2013 sex-specific dosing decision

grand_findings.title: ONCOLOGY EXCESS
grand_findings.finding: 65.2%F overall, ICIs 74.4%F, TKIs 68.4%F (+11.4pp above global)

grand_findings.title: ANTIDEPRESSANT REVERSAL
grand_findings.finding: SSRIs 42.2%F, MAOIs 7.1%F — psychiatric drugs MALE-biased

grand_findings.title: TZD EXTREME
grand_findings.finding: Rosiglitazone 93.6%F — most extreme individual drug female bias

grand_findings.title: NIH ACT IMPACT
grand_findings.finding: Pre-NIH (1994) drugs: 60.5%F → Post-NIH: 53.1%F (p=5.5e-42)

grand_findings.title: AE CONCORDANCE
grand_findings.finding: 62.6% concordance — AEs tend to maintain sex direction across drugs

grand_findings.title: RARE AE PATTERN
grand_findings.finding: Rare AEs 45.1%F vs common AEs 57.3%F — common AEs more female-biased

grand_findings.title: ICS vs SYSTEMIC
grand_findings.finding: ICS 39.1%F vs systemic steroids 76.4%F — 37.3pp route difference

grand_findings.title: MIGRAINE PARADOX
grand_findings.finding: Triptans 16.1%F despite 3:1 female migraine prevalence

grand_findings.title: REPORTING RATIO INVERSE
grand_findings.finding: F:M reporting ratio INVERSELY correlates with %F (ρ=-0.227)

grand_findings.title: RENAL BIAS
grand_findings.finding: 71.1%F — renal toxicity second most female-biased organ system

grand_findings.title: COMBO vs MONO
grand_findings.finding: Combination drugs 50.6%F vs monotherapy 54.0%F (p=5.3e-7)
